CVE-2026-25210.8eb8c0d9aab923c4744e330f24581ce150b22098:
libraries: update expat to 2.7.4 to fix CVE-2026-25210 (#8794)

## Summary
Updates the vendored expat submodule from 2.7.1 to 2.7.4 and 
updates the pre-generated expat_config.h for x86_64 and aarch64.

## Changes
- Bumped expat submodule pointer to 2.7.4 (f5c2890d)
- Updated PACKAGE_STRING and PACKAGE_VERSION in expat_config.h 
  for x86_64 and aarch64

## Verification
- Reviewed changelog between 2.7.1 and 2.7.4: no API changes, 
  only security fixes and CI/tooling updates
- Confirmed all 3 source files (xmlparse.c, xmlrole.c, xmltok.c) 
  are unchanged
- Confirmed CMakeLists.txt requires no changes
- Confirmed expat_config.h.cmake diff has no functional changes

Note: 2.7.4 also includes a fix for CVE-2026-24515, tracked in #8753,
CVE-2025-66382 tracked in #8736, CVE-2025-59375 tracked in #8702.

Fixes #8793
Fixes #8753
Fixes #8736 
Fixes #8702

CVE-2023-0464.961b4cd187f2e3ca5b214e6446730a955daaec99:
cve: Update to openssl 1.1.1u (#8050)

- Resolves CVE-2023-0464, CVE-2023-0465, CVE-2023-0466,
and CVE-2023-2650

- Minor improvement to the libraries manifest validation script,
to stop searching for an openssl version in the library CMakeLists.txt
as soon as it finds one.

- Remove patch to make openssl build on Windows ARM64,
since it's now included in the new version.

CVE-2016-5011.eff27721920c329d119fe9253236bdfb878bb743:
libs: Update util-linux to 2.35.2 (#7902)

This also resolves CVE-2016-5011, CVE-2018-7738
and ignores CVE-2021-37600 and CVE-2022-0563,
since they are not affecting osquery.

Use the libcompat library that comes with it.
